title: Replace brand logo with user-provided two-line logo

requirements.text: Replace the existing brand-logo.dim_200x60.png with the user-uploaded two-line logo image (two line logo resized.png), preserving its exact appearance without any automated resizing, compression, or color modification

quotes: this is the original logo resized properly. please use this as it is for the website

acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded two-line logo appears in the header navigation exactly as provided
Logo maintains its original dimensions, colors, and clarity
Logo is saved as brand-logo.dim_200x60.png in frontend/public/assets/generated
No automatic resizing, compression, or filtering is applied to the logo
Logo displays correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports

constraints: Do not modify the uploaded logo image in any way during processing
Use the exact PNG file provided by the user without re-encoding or compression
nonGoals: Adjusting logo dimensions or aspect ratio
Changing logo colors or applying filters

edits: Replace with the user-uploaded two-line logo maintaining exact visual fidelity (brand-logo.dim_200x60.png > brand-logo.dim_200x60.png)
